new_actions.draft_text: On just shipped our new ai feature after 3 - we switched to daily deploys last year. The cadence change was the real win, not the tools.
Agreed on hot take: most code comments are a code. I still review PRs weekly to stay connected. Helps me give better feedback to the team.
On what's your favorite vs code extension for python - what specific outcome are you optimizing for? Happy to share what worked for us.
Building on the we reduced our api response time from 800ms angle - we hit this with a large dataset. Raw SQL cut our p99 from 800ms to 50ms.
Agreed on unpopular opinion: engineering managers should still write code. I still review PRs weekly to stay connected. Helps me give better feedback to the team.
